instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall minimize shift shock during gear changes.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall control clutch pressure ramp during gear shift.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall reduce drivetrain vibration during shifting.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall coordinate engine torque reduction during shift.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall reduce gear engagement noise.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall synchronize gear speed before engagement.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall control clutch engagement to reduce vibration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall gradually increase clutch torque capacity.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect excessive vibration during operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate NVH mitigation when vibration level exceeds threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall delay shifts to reduce vibration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay gear shift when drivetrain vibration is detected.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable NVH control during system fault.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall deactivate NVH control when system fault occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor NVH control activity.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall record diagnostic data during NVH control operation.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall periodically update NVH control parameters.
